title: ononis serrata var. dehnhardtii
intro: Ononis serrata var. dehnhardtii, also known as Dehnhardt's ononite or serrated ononite, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the legume family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating kidney stones and gravel due to its anthraquinone content. The health benefits of Ononis serrata var. dehnhardtii include its diuretic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of urinary issues and kidney problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including urinary tract infections and kidney stones.
